titleStmt.title: SII 34.270: original edition by Y. Subbarayalu
No. 270. Tiruvaranguḷam, Alangudi Taluk, Pudukkottai District. On the north wall of the maṇḍapa in front of the central shrine in the Haratīrthēśvara temple.

summary.p: This is a duplicate of No. 264. [Published in IPS, No. 430.]

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
svastiśrī tiripuvaṉaccakkaravattikaḷ śrīvīrapāṇṭiya tEvaṟku 4 tu nāyaṉā cEmapiḷḷaiyāra
kampaṭi mutalikaḷil Utaiyaṉ puvanaciṅkatēvanē Uṭaiyār tiruvaraṉkuḷamuṭaiya nāyaṉār pirā
ṭṭiyāṟkup piṭṭamutu ceytaruḷa kaḷiyanaṅkaṉuḷiṭṭār pakkal Ācāriyaṉ vayalil nīr nilattil nālat
toṉṟu mippaṟṟil puñcaikaḷilum mēnōkkiṉa maramuṅ kīḻnōkkiya kiṇaṟum nāliloṉṟum va
yalil 4 l kūṟu koṇṭapaṭiyilē Āyirattaññūṟu kācu kuṭuttuk koṇṭu Innilattālp piṭṭamutu
ceyyumpaṭi tirunāyiṟṟukkiḻamai Oṉṟukkuc ceppu nāḻiyāl mukkuṟuṇi nellum Irunāḻi payaṟum miraṇ
ṭu tēṅkāyu nāḻineyyamutuṅ kuṟuṇippālamutu viṭṭa pacu nālu Aṭaikkāyamutu 5 10 Ilayamutu nūṟu Ippaṭi
cantirātittavaṉ celvatākak kalliluñ cempilum veṭṭikkuṭuttēṉ tampirāṭṭiyāṟku puva
naciṅkatēvanēṉ tirinuntā viḷakkikku koṇṭiṭṭa tirukkutti viḷak kiraṇṭiṉā liṭai Aṟupattoṉpataṉ pa
lam Uṭaiyāṟkkuc cāttiyaruḷiṉa tirumēkalaipoṉ patineḻukaḻañcu tiruppaṭṭa patinkaḻañcu nāyaṉār cēmap
piḷḷaiyār civanāmattāl Aracakaṇṭarāmaṉ tirinuntāviḷakkuñ cantiyā tīpattukkum niccayittapaṭi tiri
nuntāviḷakkiraṇṭukkum kollar Ūtukiṟa Ulaiyil Iraṇṭu Ulaikkuk kācāṟukku kaṭaiyil nāḻiyā
l Uḻakku neykku Iraṇṭu tirinuntāviḷakku Iṭavum valla nāṭṭaraiyarkaḷ kollar pēril Ā
ṭṭaikkup piṟikkum Accu Aiñcukkuk kācu Accu Aiñcukku kācu Āṟāyiramun tiruppaṅkuṉit tirunāḷukkut tiruppariyaṭṭattu
kkut tarakkaṭava kācu muṉṉūṟum Ākakkācu Āṟāyirattu muṉṉūṟukku nāḷoṉṟukku viḻukkāṭu kācu
patinēḻaraikkuc ceyyu nāḻiyāl ney nāḻi Uḻakkukku Eḻupattañcu tiruviḷakku Iravaikkut tiruvotta cā
maṅ kāṭṭiṉatu mutal piḷḷaiyār kōyil pūcai muṭivāka Iṭakkaṭavitākavum nāyaṉār cēmappiḷḷai
viṭṭa Āṭṭukkum pīṭavāri pukunta Āṭṭukkum Aḷakkakkaṭavitāka vaitta neyilē nāḷoṉṟukku
kkut tīppāttirattukkun tiruvālat taṭṭikkum
ṭap pantattukkuṅ kaḻitta tiruviḷakku Aiñcu nīkkit ti
ruviḷakkup patineṭṭukkuñ ciṟukālaic canti tuṭaṅ
ki Uccic cantiyaḷavun tiruviḷakku patinoṉṟum Ira
vaic cantikkum piḷḷaikaḷ tirukkōyil nālukku
viḷakku nālum tirumaṭaippaḷḷit tiruviḷakkoṉṟu
tampirāṭṭiyāṟkum piḷḷaiyāṟkum tiruviḷakkiraṇ
ṭum Ākat tiruviḷakkup patineṭṭu mippaṭi cantirā
tittavarai celvatākak kallu veṭṭikkuṭuttē
n puvaṉa ciṅka tēvanēṉ Itu Ivūr kaṇakkut tiru
vēṭpūruṭaiyāṉ Aruḷāḷapperumāḷ Eḻuttu
Digital edition of SII 34.270 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
